machine_followups.issue: internal/client/client.go's do() and the resolvePaginatedRead helper do not thread cmd.Context() to outbound HTTP requests by default, so generated typed endpoints (channels-list, videos-list, etc.) cannot be cancelled with Ctrl+C and ignore --timeout. The per-CLI WithContext escape hatch fixes only hand-authored commands.

Generator emits HTML-entity-bearing API response strings to JSON consumers without unescaping at the API boundary. Affects every search-shaped endpoint across YouTube and other APIs whose payloads carry HTML-encoded text.
